title: Haft Paykar: The Seven Beauties
description: Nizami's masterpiece: King Bahram visits seven pavilions, each housing a princess from a different land, who tells him a story. Seven stories within a story.
introduction: Nizami's masterpiece: King Bahram visits seven pavilions, each housing a princess from a different land, who tells him a story. Seven stories within a story.

translation.text: On Saturday, in the black pavilion, the Indian princess told her tale. On Sunday, in the yellow pavilion, the princess of the West told hers. Each day a new color, a new story, a new wisdom.
